summary: Iteration 100 - All 8 features tested and PASSED. Backend: 6/6 tests passed. Frontend: 4/4 UI tests passed. Key fixes verified: 1) Registration without cooperative_code auto-uses agent's coop, 2) Photos completion now checks agent_photos collection, 3) REDD field added to forms_status.
critical_code_review_comments: register-web endpoint (ussd.py lines 2357-2460) correctly creates coop_member with agent's coop_id when agent_id is provided and no cooperative_code
my-farmers endpoint (field_agent_dashboard.py lines 422-430) now checks both geotagged_photos AND agent_photos collections for photo completion
forms_status now has 6 keys: ici, ssrte, redd, parcels, photos, register (line 474-480)
Frontend registration form (AgentTerrainDashboard.jsx line 360) shows 'automatiquement inscrit dans votre cooperative' text and has NO cooperative_code field
seed_data_creation: Test farmers created during testing: TEST_Planteur_Iter100_*, TEST_CoopCheck_*, TEST_UIPlanteur_4547
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 100 features verified working. Agent has 9 assigned farmers. Konan Yao Pierre has 2 photos in agent_photos collection showing as completed. Registration form correctly auto-assigns farmers to agent's cooperative without requiring cooperative_code input.
